agent.name: Field Notes Research Agent
agent.description: Chat-first research agent that records observations, preserves source evidence, and keeps themes and follow-up questions current.

template.name: Field Notes Research
template.description: A read-only research dossier backed by local SQLite and operated through chat/API writes.

secrets.name: APP_PASSWORD
secrets.description: Optional password for HTTP Basic Auth on /app and /app/api/*.

api.description: Read the research dossier or add a sourced field note.
